headline: Expand Energy Corporation Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: SPRING, Texas, April 28, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Expand Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: EXE) (“Expand Energy” or the “Company”) today reported first quarter 2026 financial and operating results. Net cash provided by operating activities of $2,402 million, reflecting continued strong cash generation from operationsNet income of $1,159 million, or $4.81 per fully diluted share; adjusted net income (1) of $923 million, or $3.83 per diluted shareAdjusted EBITDAX(1) of $1,968 millionNet production of ~7

content.title: Expand Energy Corporation Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
content.summary: SPRING, Texas, April 28, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Expand Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: EXE) (“Expand Energy” or the “Company”) today reported first quarter 2026 financial and operating results. Net cash provided by operating activities of $2,402 million, reflecting continued strong cash generation from operationsNet income of $1,159 million, or $4.81 per fully diluted share; adjusted net income (1) of $923 million, or $3.83 per diluted shareAdjusted EBITDAX(1) of $1,968 millionNet production of ~7
